title: Cue Governed Agent Team Artifact v0
description: Structured output produced by a governed agent-team run (#1545). Returned by `cclab.agent.team_run(team, prompt)` and consumed by Cue services. Six top-level content keys (requirements_summary, app_spec_changes, implementation, tests, release_package, review_tickets) match #1545 acceptance criterion #2.

status.description: Run outcome. "NotImplemented" is emitted by T4 stubs; real runs use ok/partial/error.

issue.description: Issue tag emitted by the agent (e.g. "#1545 T4" for stub identification).

prompt.description: Echo of the prompt the team ran on. Stub diagnostic; real runs may omit or summarize.

roles.description: Roles invoked for this run. Matches cclab_agent::types::AgentRole serde-lowercase form.

requirements_summary.description: PM-role output — what the team understood the user wants.

app_spec_changes.description: Designer-role output — App Spec patches as path+diff pairs.

implementation.description: Dev-role output — narrative or pointer to generated code.

tests.description: QA-role output — test descriptors and outcomes.

release_package.description: Release-role output — release manifest (artifacts, version, env targets). Free-form object until Release protocol stabilises.

review_tickets.description: Admin review tickets emitted during the run. See review-ticket.v0.schema.json.
